'''âv-r-j-k''' ('''kavarjekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:query|query]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-r-j-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:query|query]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-r-j-k
|-
! Lemma
| kavarjekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivarjekoko|thivarjekoko]] || [[word:jivarjekoko|jivarjekoko]] || [[word:shivarjekoko|shivarjekoko]] || [[word:kivarjekoko|kivarjekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvarjekoko|thuthuvarjekoko]] || [[word:jujuvarjekoko|jujuvarjekoko]] || [[word:shushuvarjekoko|shushuvarjekoko]] || [[word:kukuvarjekoko|kukuvarjekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvarjekoko|thuvarjekoko]] || [[word:juvarjekoko|juvarjekoko]] || [[word:shuvarjekoko|shuvarjekoko]] || [[word:kuvarjekoko|kuvarjekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvarjekoko|thuvarjekoko]] || [[word:juvarjekoko|juvarjekoko]] || [[word:shuvarjekoko|shuvarjekoko]] || [[word:kuvarjekoko|kuvarjekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevarjekoko|thevarjekoko]] || [[word:jevarjekoko|jevarjekoko]] || [[word:shevarjekoko|shevarjekoko]] || [[word:kevarjekoko|kevarjekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovarjekoko|thothovarjekoko]] || [[word:jojovarjekoko|jojovarjekoko]] || [[word:shoshovarjekoko|shoshovarjekoko]] || [[word:kokovarjekoko|kokovarjekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovarjekoko|thovarjekoko]] || [[word:jovarjekoko|jovarjekoko]] || [[word:shovarjekoko|shovarjekoko]] || [[word:kovarjekoko|kovarjekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovarjekoko|thovarjekoko]] || [[word:jovarjekoko|jovarjekoko]] || [[word:shovarjekoko|shovarjekoko]] || [[word:kovarjekoko|kovarjekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvarjekoko|thĂŠvarjekoko]] || [[word:jĂŠvarjekoko|jĂŠvarjekoko]] || [[word:shĂŠvarjekoko|shĂŠvarjekoko]] || [[word:kĂŠvarjekoko|kĂŠvarjekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavarjekoko|thathavarjekoko]] || [[word:jajavarjekoko|jajavarjekoko]] || [[word:shashavarjekoko|shashavarjekoko]] || [[word:kakavarjekoko|kakavarjekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavarjekoko|thavarjekoko]] || [[word:javarjekoko|javarjekoko]] || [[word:shavarjekoko|shavarjekoko]] || [[word:kavarjekoko|kavarjekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavarjekoko|thavarjekoko]] || [[word:javarjekoko|javarjekoko]] || [[word:shavarjekoko|shavarjekoko]] || [[word:kavarjekoko|kavarjekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
